about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: INTECH ISC Global is a pioneering institution in Vietnam, integrating industrial training, consulting, and applied education into a unified ecosystem.
about.subtitle2: We deliver industry-aligned solutions that bridge theory and practice, empowering individuals and organizations to succeed in the global marketplace.
about.intro_title: Bridging the gap between academia and practice
about.intro_desc: Established in 2021, INTECH ISC Group is a forward-thinking organization positioned at the intersection of industry, education, and international mobility. With a strong foundation in Vietnam's industrial landscape, we bring a strategic and practical understanding of how businesses operate in an increasingly globalized economy.
about.intro_desc2: Guided by three core pillars — Industry, Education, and Global Mobility — INTECH ISC delivers an integrated ecosystem that connects enterprise needs with talent development and cross-border opportunities. Our approach ensures that learning is aligned with real-world applications, while fostering international exposure and global competencies.
about.intro_desc3: Committed to excellence, innovation, and long-term impact, INTECH ISC is dedicated to developing a future-ready workforce and becoming a trusted partner for organizations, institutions, and learners across Vietnam, Southeast Asia, and the global market.
about.mission_desc: Serving as a strategic bridge between key ecosystems of the modern economy.
about.mission_industry_desc: Enhance operational capacity, optimize processes and drive meaningful digital transformation for manufacturing and logistics enterprises.
about.mission_education_desc: Standardize skills and equip practical knowledge for students and working professionals, preparing them for high-level positions.
about.mission_mobility_desc: Open cross-border career and learning opportunities through an international learning and experience ecosystem.
about.focus_subtitle: At Intech Global Academy, all activities are guided by 5 core values.
about.focus_f_desc: Always leading in updating technology (AI, IoT) and anticipating future industrial trends.
about.focus_o_desc: Committed to delivering the highest efficiency in improving business processes and individual career paths.
about.focus_c_desc: Building a tight network linking Academia – Business – Global Labor Market.
about.focus_u_desc: Unlock the unlimited potential of people and unleash technological power to create new breakthroughs.
about.focus_s_desc: Create collective strength from the synergy of 3 core activity areas, growing together with partners and students.
about.cta_desc: Explore in-depth courses designed specifically for the industrial sector, helping you master technology and optimize operations.
about.privacy_desc: Learn how we collect, use and protect your personal data and information on our system.
about.terms_desc: Learn about the regulations, rights and legal responsibilities when using Intech's services.

privacy.title: ONLINE PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.intro: This policy governs how Intech Global Academy collects and processes information when you access and interact with features on the website.
privacy.section1_item1_desc: We automatically collect information via Cookies and similar technologies, including IP address, browser type, language and access time to optimize website display.
privacy.section1_item2_desc: The website uses cookies to remember user preferences and analyze traffic to improve the user experience on the site.
privacy.section2_item1_desc: When you use forms on the website (such as newsletter signup, course consultation requests, workshop participation), we collect your full name, email and phone number.
privacy.section2_item2_desc: This information is only used to respond to your requests, provide information about courses (such as the AI-Powered Workflow Workshop) or training programs you are interested in.
privacy.section3_desc1: We use HTTPS/SSL protocol to encrypt data transmitted between your browser and the website server to prevent unauthorized interference.
privacy.section3_desc2: Personal data collected through the website is stored in a strictly controlled environment and absolutely not shared with any third party for marketing purposes.
privacy.footer_contact: For any questions about the privacy policy, please contact: support@intechisc.com

terms.title: WEBSITE TERMS OF USE
terms.intro: By accessing the Intech Global Academy website, you agree to comply with the following regulations.
terms.section1_title: 1. Intellectual property rights on the website
terms.section1_desc1: All content displayed on the website including: Taglines, course descriptions, training catalog (Applied AI, Quality Management, IoT...), images and source code are the intellectual property of Intech.
terms.section1_desc2: Users may only view and reference content. Any copying or online content citation for commercial purposes without written consent from Intech is strictly prohibited.
terms.section2_item1_desc: No automated tools (bots, scrapers) may be used to collect data from the website; actions that obstruct or overload the website's technical infrastructure are prohibited.
terms.section2_item2_desc: Users commit to not submitting content that violates the law, is offensive or contains malicious code through contact forms on the website.
terms.section3_desc: The website may contain links to other websites (e.g.: AI tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini or learning management platforms). Intech is not responsible for the content or privacy policies of these third-party websites.
terms.section4_title: 4. Limitation of liability for online information
terms.section4_desc: Information about courses and solutions on the website (such as the roadmap diagram "Start Small. Scale Fast. Go Global") is for introduction and reference purposes. Intech reserves the right to update or change this content at any time without prior notice.
terms.footer_contact: For any questions about the terms of use, please contact: support@intechisc.com

consulting.overview_title: A hands-on partner, not just a consultant
consulting.overview_desc: In the era of Industry 4.0, Intech ISC positions itself as a field-tested partner, helping businesses close the gap between technology potential and real operational performance. We blend three knowledge pillars: Modern Technology (AI/IoT), Lean Management (Lean Six Sigma), and Global Supply Chain Thinking.
consulting.services_subtitle: 4 core value axes — ensuring cohesion and synchronization across the entire organization.
consulting.tab1_desc: Build roadmaps and deploy comprehensive digitalization technology for manufacturing enterprises.
consulting.tab1_item1_desc: Assess digital readiness and design a phased technology investment roadmap to prevent resource waste.
consulting.tab1_item2_desc: Deploy real-time sensor monitoring systems and smart cameras to automate quality inspection.
consulting.tab1_item3_desc: Use data to predict equipment failures before they occur, minimizing machine downtime.
consulting.tab2_desc: Design and optimize logistics networks to reduce costs and free up working capital.
consulting.tab2_item1_desc: Optimize warehouse and distribution center locations to reduce total transportation costs.
consulting.tab2_item2_desc: Apply modern mathematical models to set safe stock levels and free up working capital.
consulting.tab2_item3_desc: Optimize movement flows and picking processes using positioning technology and data analytics.
consulting.tab3_desc: Standardize and digitalize all operational processes on an integrated ERP platform.
consulting.tab3_item1_desc: Convert fragmented manual processes to an integrated management system: Sales, Inventory, Manufacturing, Accounting.
consulting.tab3_item2_desc: Design specialized modules tailored to the company's specific production and logistics workflows.
consulting.tab3_item3_desc: Ensure your team masters the system through hands-on training directly on real business data.
consulting.tab4_desc: Eliminate waste, reduce variation and build international-standard quality systems.
consulting.tab4_item1_desc: Eliminate 8 types of waste and minimize process variation using the DMAIC methodology.
consulting.tab4_item2_desc: Build a data-driven quality control system (SPC) and international ISO standards compliance.
consulting.tab4_item3_desc: Help businesses maximize tariff advantages from free trade agreements to boost international competitiveness.
consulting.industries_subtitle: Focusing resources on sectors with the greatest impact on global value chains.
consulting.industry1_desc: Electronics components, precision engineering, and consumer goods. Optimize production processes and quality control to international standards.
consulting.industry2_desc: Help transportation and warehousing units improve efficiency and provide data transparency to customers.
consulting.industry3_desc: Support retail and distribution businesses optimize demand forecasting and omnichannel supply management.
consulting.industry4_desc: Intech ISC continuously expands its advisory scope to new industries. Contact us to discuss your specific needs.
consulting.cases_subtitle: Projects we have completed and are currently executing.
consulting.case1_desc: Deployed AIoT and real-time monitoring for an electronics production line, reducing defect rate by 35%.
consulting.case2_desc: Redesigned warehouse network and transportation routes, reducing logistics costs by 22% in the first 6 months.
consulting.case3_desc: Standardized end-to-end processes from procurement to sales and accounting on Odoo in 3 months.
consulting.approach_subtitle: A 5-stage consulting roadmap combining field experience and modern mathematical optimization models.
consulting.step1_desc: Conduct Gemba surveys and analyze real operational data to precisely identify bottlenecks, waste, and improvement opportunities.
consulting.step2_desc: Apply multi-criteria decision-making methods (MCDM) such as AHP, WASPAS, or CRITIC to design and select the optimal solution for cost, resources, and performance.
consulting.step3_desc: Realize the Start Small model in a specific area or production line to validate real ROI metrics and refine processes before large-scale investment.
consulting.step4_desc: Simultaneously deploy ERP (Odoo), AI, and IoT, ensuring operational data is continuously connected and transparent in real time.
consulting.step5_desc: Train your team using hands-on methods and build automated monitoring mechanisms — the foundation to Scale Fast and Go Global.
consulting.glossary_gemba: Gemba (現場): Japanese for "actual workplace". Gemba survey = direct observation on the shop floor.
consulting.glossary_mcdm: MCDM: Multi-Criteria Decision Making — evaluates multiple criteria simultaneously to reach an optimal decision.
consulting.glossary_ahp: AHP: Analytic Hierarchy Process — a structured technique for organizing and analyzing complex decisions.
consulting.glossary_spc: SPC: Statistical Process Control — using statistical methods to monitor and control a process.
consulting.cta_title: Ready to start your consulting journey?
consulting.cta_desc: Book a free consultation with an Intech ISC expert. We will contact you within 24 hours.

globalMobility.overview_desc: Global Mobility at Intech ISC is a comprehensive workforce and knowledge mobility ecosystem. We not only create roadmaps for Vietnamese talent to reach the international stage, but are also proud to be a trusted destination for foreign students and professionals to study, research, and experience one of Southeast Asia's most dynamic industrial environments.
globalMobility.tours_subtitle: At INTECH ISC Group, we transform educational travel into strategic international learning platforms, positioning Vietnam as a vital hub for global mobility and professional growth.
globalMobility.tours_bullet1: Strategic Industry Integration: Bridge the gap between academic theory and real-world business environments through immersive workshops and company visits.
globalMobility.tours_bullet2: Vietnam as a Growth Hub: Gain direct exposure to one of Asia's fastest-growing economies, where innovation, entrepreneurship, and digital transformation converge.
globalMobility.tours_bullet3: Future-Ready Competencies: Equip professionals and students with the cross-cultural collaboration and adaptive skills required in modern, automated supply chains.
globalMobility.tours_bullet4: Interdisciplinary Experiential Learning: Move beyond passive observation with structured programs that encourage critical thinking and professional networking.
globalMobility.tours_bullet5: Collaborative Ecosystems: Access a regional platform that connects international institutions and industry partners through impactful, future-oriented engagement.
globalMobility.tour1_destination: Ho Chi Minh City & Mekong Delta
globalMobility.tour2_destination: Ho Chi Minh City & Mekong Delta
globalMobility.academic_subtitle: Cross-border academic roadmaps and expert exchange programs
globalMobility.pathway1_desc: Build articulation pathways, degree recognition and support students to join Master's and PhD programs at prestigious partner universities.
globalMobility.pathway2_desc: Attract international PhD students and experts to Vietnam to conduct research projects on Supply Chain and Smart Manufacturing.
globalMobility.pathway3_desc: Support credential recognition procedures and connect high-level internship and professional positions for domestic and international personnel through our global partner network.
globalMobility.cta_desc: Contact Intech ISC to explore Global Mobility programs that are right for you.

globalPartnerships.overview_desc: Intech ISC's global partner network is a close collaboration between leading educational institutions, specialized research institutes, and pioneering technology enterprises. We serve as a strategic touchpoint where international knowledge is localized to solve real challenges facing Vietnam's industrial sector, while opening doors for domestic talent to enter high-level labor markets worldwide.
globalPartnerships.partners_subtitle: We are proud to work alongside reputable organizations across many sectors
globalPartnerships.models_subtitle: Intech builds flexible collaboration models to optimize the strengths of all parties
globalPartnerships.model1_desc: Establish bilateral experiential learning programs (Inbound & Outbound), integrating in-depth workshops at university labs, on-site visits to high-tech enterprises, and local economic-cultural ecosystem experiences.
globalPartnerships.model2_desc: Collaborate on modern optimization models applied to logistics and supply chain project development.
globalPartnerships.model3_desc: Work with enterprises and international experts to build hands-on curricula integrating AI, IoT, and Digital Twin technologies into teaching.
globalPartnerships.model4_desc: Establish training roadmaps and high-quality talent supply that precisely meet the real needs of labor markets in Vietnam and developed countries.
globalPartnerships.model5_desc: Transfer enterprise management solutions and smart manufacturing technology through short-term consulting and training projects.
globalPartnerships.cta_desc: We always welcome new collaboration opportunities to co-create breakthrough value. If your organization is looking for a trusted partner in Vietnam, connect with us.
